rationale: Outward TokenKey brand surfaces that must stay converged: default SPA title, public README product heading, SPA document-title fallback, and the fifth-platform admin label (internal key remains `newapi`; user-facing copy is Extension Engine per docs/global/tokenkey-opc-transformation-plan.md §7.2). This registry intentionally does NOT ban `sub2api` / `newapi` where they are compatibility or routing identifiers.

sentinels.rationale: Default embedded SPA browser tab title before JS runs; regressing to Sub2API breaks the single-product narrative for every fresh load.
Public English README is the primary outbound product boundary; the H1 and overview sentence anchor the TokenKey brand for operators and integrators.
Chinese README H1 must stay aligned with the English product brand.
Japanese README H1 must stay aligned with the English product brand.
SPA `document.title` fallback when site_name is unset; drifting back to Sub2API re-splits admin tab branding from the embedded index.html default.
Fifth platform admin display label: degrades `newapi` from an external product name to Extension Engine while keeping the platform key `newapi` for routing/API.

must_contain: TokenKey has a built-in payment system
sentinels.rationale: Public payment guide is an external operator-facing surface; the opening sentence should stay aligned with the TokenKey product brand.
Deployment overview is an outward operator-facing entry point; its title and opening sentence should stay aligned with the TokenKey product brand.
Docker Hub/operator documentation is an external product surface; its title and opening sentence should stay aligned with the TokenKey brand.
The one-click installer is an operator-visible setup surface; its bilingual title must stay aligned with the TokenKey product brand.
The systemd unit description is shown to operators in service tooling and should present the outward TokenKey product brand while keeping the compatibility unit filename unchanged.
The datamanagementd unit description is operator-visible and should use the TokenKey outward brand while preserving the compatibility unit filename.

must_contain: LABEL description="TokenKey - AI API Gateway Platform"
sentinels.rationale: The root runtime image label is an external metadata surface and should reflect the TokenKey brand while preserving image names and source URLs.

must_contain: LABEL description="TokenKey - AI API Gateway Platform"
sentinels.rationale: The deploy runtime image label is external metadata and should reflect the TokenKey brand while preserving image names and source URLs.

must_contain: LABEL description="TokenKey - AI API Gateway Platform"
sentinels.rationale: The release image label is external metadata and should reflect the TokenKey brand while preserving image names and source URLs.
